topic: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses)

drills.title: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses) — Speaking Set 1

sentences.english: I have been living here for two years.
sentences.hindi: मैं दो साल से यहाँ रह रहा हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i have been living here for two years

sentences.english: I have been living here since 2020.
sentences.hindi: मैं 2020 से यहाँ रह रहा हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i have been living here since 2020

sentences.english: She has been studying for three hours.
sentences.hindi: वह तीन घंटे से पढ़ रही है।
sentences.pronunciation: she has been studying for three hours

drills.title: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses) — Speaking Set 2

sentences.english: She has been studying since morning.
sentences.hindi: वह सुबह से पढ़ रही है।
sentences.pronunciation: she has been studying since morning

sentences.english: We have been friends for five years.
sentences.hindi: हम पाँच साल से दोस्त हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: we have been friends for five years

sentences.english: We have been friends since college.
sentences.hindi: हम कॉलेज के समय से दोस्त हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: we have been friends since college

drills.title: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses) — Speaking Set 3

sentences.english: He has not done this work for a week.
sentences.hindi: उसने एक हफ्ते से यह काम नहीं किया।
sentences.pronunciation: he has not done this work for a week

sentences.english: He has not done this work since Monday.
sentences.hindi: उसने सोमवार से यह काम नहीं किया।
sentences.pronunciation: he has not done this work since monday

sentences.english: I have known this for ten years.
sentences.hindi: मुझे दस साल से यह जानकारी है।
sentences.pronunciation: i have known this for ten years

drills.title: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses) — Speaking Set 4

sentences.english: I have known this since 2015.
sentences.hindi: मुझे 2015 से यह जानकारी है।
sentences.pronunciation: i have known this since 2015

sentences.english: He has been sick for two months.
sentences.hindi: वह दो महीने से बीमार है।
sentences.pronunciation: he has been sick for two months

sentences.english: He has been sick since his birthday.
sentences.hindi: वह अपने जन्मदिन से बीमार है।
sentences.pronunciation: he has been sick since his birthday

drills.title: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses) — Speaking Set 5

sentences.english: They have been in this house for three years.
sentences.hindi: वे तीन साल से इस घर में हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: they have been in this house for three years

sentences.english: They have been in this house since their marriage.
sentences.hindi: वे शादी के बाद से इस घर में हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: they have been in this house since their marriage

sentences.english: I have been waiting for an hour.
sentences.hindi: मैं एक घंटे से इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i have been waiting for an hour

drills.title: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses) — Speaking Set 6

sentences.english: I have been waiting since noon.
sentences.hindi: मैं दोपहर से इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i have been waiting since noon

sentences.english: She has done this job for four years.
sentences.hindi: उसने चार साल से यह नौकरी की है।
sentences.pronunciation: she has done this job for four years

sentences.english: She has done this job since 2021.
sentences.hindi: उसने 2021 से यह नौकरी की है।
sentences.pronunciation: she has done this job since 2021

drills.title: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses) — Speaking Set 7

sentences.english: We have been practicing for two weeks.
sentences.hindi: हम दो हफ्ते से practice कर रहे हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: we have been practicing for two weeks

sentences.english: We have been practicing since the beginning.
sentences.hindi: हम शुरुआत से practice कर रहे हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: we have been practicing since the beginning
